steps.title: Find the contrast the passage is making
steps.content: The phrase “may not be limited to ______ behaviors” signals that the passage is arguing these organisms do more than [what kind of] behavior. The context is single-celled organisms with stereotypical constraints, so the blank must name the kind of simple, basic behavior we'd normally assume they're restricted to.

steps.title: Name the stereotypical limitation
steps.content: The target meaning is “simple, elementary, or basic behaviors.” “Rudimentary” precisely expresses this—it means fundamental or basic. The organism's demonstrated strategy-switching contradicts the assumption that it's limited to such simple behaviors. The other three describe different behavioral aspects unrelated to complexity. That matches choice B — B is correct.
